title: Mybench Report
description: Versioned activity report derived from ledger metadata per docs/metrics-v0.md. This is a publishable-field whitelist (privacy invariant #1): aggregates and coarse bucketed distributions only — no per-session values, no time series, no hour-of-day granularity, no ordered sequences. Version 1 replaces the v0 stub; every metric carries exactly one trust tier (THREAT_MODEL §6). The tier enum is extended only by schema_version bump (future TEE-VERIFIED).

schema_version.description: Report schema version; bump on breaking changes (including tier-enum or bucket-edge changes).

report_version.description: Version label of this particular report instance.

generated_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp, supplied as scorer INPUT (determinism).

scorer_version.description: Version of the scorer that produced this report.

input_schema_versions.description: Schema versions observed in the private ledger rows and date-only anchor events used by the scorer.

anchored_through.description: Latest UTC date among supplied anchor events; absent when no anchor exists.

backfill_note.description: Required whenever capture-time-based metrics are present: states that backfilled history is anchored as of anchor time.

binding_tips.description: Pinned repo tips used for binding_coverage, keyed by opted-in repo name: full commit hash.

metrics.description: Computed metrics per docs/metrics-v0.md, sorted by name.

name.description: Metric name as pinned in docs/metrics-v0.md.

value.description: Aggregate number, or a distribution keyed by pinned bucket labels.

trust_tier.description: PROVEN = verifiable from public artifacts + open code alone; ANCHORED = timing/volume proven, content-derived facts asserted; JUDGED = reproducible model opinion (excluded in v0).

caveat.description: Honest-limits note that ships WITH the metric (e.g. provider-reported token counts).
